title: delphinium exaltatum var. typicum
intro: Delphinium exaltatum var. typicum, also known as the tall delphinium or exaltation larkspur, is a perennial flowering plant native to North America. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Delphinium exaltatum var. typicum include its ability to reduce fever, soothe sore throats, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
